agentLoop.singleTurn.notes: Single model call + tool dispatch, Anthropic Sonnet 4.6, no caching.

memoryEngine.recall.notes: Jaccard similarity ranking over 5-organ store, 200-record corpus.

fileSearch.glob.notes: Glob over packages/core/src (~600 files), no cache.

treeSitter.parse.notes: Parse a 500-LOC TypeScript file into an AST.

regressionThresholds.notes: Regression alert fires if any tracked operation regresses past these thresholds vs baseline.

howToRegenerate: Run `node scripts/measure-perf.mjs` after any change to the agent loop, tool runtime, or memory engine. Replace this file with the output.
